div1.entryFree:
Fro, 1) prepos. == from: copest with death himself to scape f. it, Rom. IV, 1, 75 (Qq from). why did you throw your wedded lady f. you? Cymb. V, 5, 261 (M. Edd. from).
2) adv. to and fro == hither and thither, up and down: H6A II, 1, 69. H6B IV, 8, 58. the to and fro conflicting wind and rain, Lr. III, 1, 11. debating to and fro, H6B I, 1, 91.
